hook: This $47 cover made my destroyed couch look new.

aida_breakdown.attention: Extreme close-up of pet-hair-covered, stained, scratched couch — immediately recognizable disaster state with $47 on-screen text
aida_breakdown.interest: Owner exhausted from hiding the mess with blankets, reupholstery quotes at $500+ making the problem feel unsolvable
aida_breakdown.desire: Mamma Mia cover unboxed, stretches on in one afternoon with no tools — final reveal looks like a completely different couch
aida_breakdown.action: Product shot beside transformed couch with arrow pointing to bio

value_equation.dream_outcome: Couch looks like a $500+ reupholster for $47
value_equation.perceived_likelihood: Visible before/after, waterproof stretch fit confirmed on camera — no guessing required
value_equation.time_delay: One afternoon, no tools, no furniture moving
value_equation.effort_sacrifice: One Amazon box, stretches on by hand, fits most sofas

scenes.visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of a worn sofa: visible pet hair clumps, a dark stain on the seat cushion, frayed armrest fabric. Natural window light. Uncomfortable to look at.
scenes.voiceover: My couch was genuinely embarrassing to look at.

scenes.visual_prompt: Person sitting on the couch looking defeated, dog actively shedding beside them. Blankets draped haphazardly over the worst spots. Relatable domestic chaos.
scenes.voiceover: I was tired of covering it with blankets.

scenes.visual_prompt: Phone screen showing a furniture reupholstery quote: $550. Person's face reacts with wide eyes and a slow head shake. Quick cut.
Amazon box opened on the living room floor. Mamma Mia Covers packaging visible. Person pulls out a soft neutral-toned stretch cover and looks skeptical, turning it over in their hands.
scenes.voiceover: I was skeptical. It looked too simple to work.

scenes.visual_prompt: Hands stretching the cover over sofa cushions, tucking it into crevices. No tools. Smooth snug fit forming. Slightly time-lapse style — fast and satisfying.
scenes.voiceover: One afternoon. No tools. It just stretches on.

scenes.visual_prompt: Final wide shot: couch fully covered in a clean fitted neutral tone. Single throw pillow placed on top. Bright clean room. Couch looks brand new.
scenes.voiceover: I was wrong. It looks like a completely different couch.

scenes.visual_prompt: Product shot of Mamma Mia cover packaging beside the transformed couch. On-screen arrow pointing upward toward bio text.

caption:
This $47 cover made my destroyed couch look new.

Pet hair, stains, scratched armrests — I was embarrassed to have people over. Reupholstery quotes were $500+. Not happening.

Found the Mamma Mia waterproof stretch cover on Amazon. I was skeptical. I was wrong.

One afternoon. No tools. Stretches on like it was custom-made.

Now my couch looks like I spent real money on it.

Link in bio.

#couchcover #petproofhome #sofacover #springcleaning2026 #homerefresh #stretchsofa #dogmom

affiliate_strategy.primary_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
